1 round:
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
3 PVC Pass Throughs
3 PVC Around the Worlds each way
10 Band Row Rotate Press
10 World's Greatest Stretch
10 Cossack Squats
10 Broad Jumps
2 Rounds (PVC/Barbell):
3 Snatch Pull
3 Hang Power Snatch
3 Snatch Balance
3 Full Snatch
5 OH Squat

strength.name: Snatch Balance
strength.description:
1x2 | E2MOM 10min
Work Up to a Top Set of 2. Increase weight if it is feeling good or dial it in for another set.

hypertrophy.reasoning: Today heavily taxes shoulders, traps, and quads via snatches. Address posterior chain and lat strength for balance and injury prevention.

siri_text: Friday's workout. Strength: Snatch Balance, 1 by 2. Strength: Snatch, 3 by 2 at 90 percent. Metcon: Randy. For Time. For hypertrophy, focus on back (lats/rows), hamstrings, glutes.
